title: Character Sheet
description: An open source Roleplay-like charcacters implementations with an integrated clothing system, skin modifier, character switcher and stats system.
body:
# Character Sheet
is a mod modyfing most of the aspect of a player for a more roleplay experience.
The main command, /character allow you to import a profile from a external, web-based, character editor where a player can choose his skin and his stats points.
In game the mod allow to : 
- Unlock and equip cloths
- Level-up stats and unlock skills
- Switch between different saved characters (skin, cloth, stats and inventory are swapped on the go, no need to restart the game)

To setup the mod and the required web editor, please visit the [Git Repository](https://github.com/Diamssword/character_sheets_mod) 

/!\ If you want to exploit all the fonctionality of the skills system, you will have to use the api: the mod by itself doen't add any interaction with the skills, you can visit the github's project page for more instruction.
